级流】
我为替嫁，从一个庶子成了齐王世子妃。
新婚后，萧彻珩对我冷淡，侧妃找我麻烦，我反手掌握了王府财权， 又在一次刺杀中救了萧彻珩的命。
当太医抖着声音说出时，萧彻珩失手捏碎了手里的玉杯，他看着我，眼神里满是震惊。
萧彻珩下令：“从今天起，谁敢伤他，就诛谁九族。”
【世子妃时期】
我利用自己的龙曦稳住了王府的局面，帮助萧彻珩一步步夺得太子之位。
【太子妃时期】
萧彻珩离京南巡时，我以太子妃的身份监国理政，查清了一桩科举舞弊大案，让满朝文武都对我跪下，称赞我贤德。
【皇后时期】
敌国联合起来逼宫，当着所有人的面，说出了我的秘密，想让我死。
龙椅上，萧彻珩紧紧握住我的手，对天下人宣布：“皇后是上天赐下的祥瑞，皇嗣就是天命所归！”
那天，我踩着敌人的血和满天飞的流言，坐稳了皇后的位置。
【皇太后时期】
萧彻珩死得早，留下年幼的太子登基。
我垂帘听政，平定了内乱，改革了旧制。
“这江山，我既要守住，也要传下去。”
【太皇太后时期】
新帝贤明，天下太平。
看我容疏晏如何以男子之身，执凤印、掌江山、定乾坤。
最终在史书上，写下不朽篇章。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oec8fc23b7623ce89f2732c564f3de78e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"傅辰云","author_id":"","book_id":"7582422036715162648","book_name":"谋天下：从世子妃到太皇太后","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7582427973681152574","read_count":"236","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"362558"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"169","tags":"双男主,纯爱,古代,天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2oec8fc23b7623ce89f2732c564f3de78e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362065&x-signature=XfJ87obDFeSVXnb%2FnD96auO4PxQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"6555909415","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"19"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191425E016E5D2E0A1B6D735A9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读48分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2900,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":399},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1767487362,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extr
